gates_from_ag60a.gate: Nityanand Mishra ji methodology/style reference and Sanskrit/Hindi correctness verification required before calling it generated.

module_status.requirement: Verify Nityanand Mishra ji methodology/style reference, Sanskrit correctness, Hindi meaning and editorial source before automated/daily generation.
Verify panchang calculation/source method, date/location behaviour and festival source.
Verify reviewed-source basis; ensure no deterministic prediction, invented mantra or unsupported claim.
